# Magnoolia Kodud — LLM Reference File
# https://magnoolia.ee/llms.txt
# Last updated: 2026-07-01 (Phase 34.2)

## Brand
Name: Magnoolia Kodud
Website: https://magnoolia.ee
Type: New residential development (ridaelamu / townhouse)

## Location
Street: Magnoolia tee
Village: Vaela küla
Municipality: Kiili vald
County: Harjumaa
Country: Estonia (EE)
Coordinates (approximate): 59.35°N, 24.78°E
Distance to Tallinn city centre: approximately 20–30 minutes by car (traffic-dependent)

## Project
Format: 19 energy-class-A townhouses (ridaelamukodud)
Total homes: 19
Phase I: Magnoolia tee 1 and Magnoolia tee 3 — 7 homes — planned completion spring 2027
Phase II: Magnoolia tee 5, 7, 9 and 11 — 12 homes — planned completion spring 2028

## Home specifications
Plan A: 4–5 rooms, ~129.2–129.6 m² net area (depending on unit)
Plan B: 4–5 rooms, ~129.2–143.2 m² net area (depending on unit)
Every home includes: private yard, terrace, balcony, 2 parking spaces
Heating: ground source heat pump (planned), underfloor heating in every room
Ventilation: heat-recovery mechanical ventilation (planned)
EV charging: readiness at parking spaces (planned)
Solar panels: roof preparation for future installation (planned)
Energy class: A (designed to A-class requirements)

## Interior finish (Prestige package — illustrative)
Wall tiles: 60×120 cm in bathrooms, sauna anteroom, showers (~121 m² per unit)
Floor tiles: 60×60 cm in hallway, WC, sauna rooms (~104 m² per unit)
Heating: underfloor water heating in all rooms
Energy class: A
Interior design consultant: Aet Piel (aet@piel.ee, +372 555 38 586, www.aetpiel.com)
Note: Exact material brands and finish packages are confirmed in the sales offer.

## Developer
Company: Estlanda Ehitus OÜ
Website: https://estlanda.ee
Logo: Available (Estlanda brand logo)

## Contact
Sales representative: Diana Tali
Phone: +372 58 16 40 78
Email: diana@estlanda.ee
Company: Estlanda Ehitus OÜ

## Key pages
/kodud-ja-hinnad — all 19 homes, floor plans, prices
/asendiplaan — site plan showing home placement, interactive unit discovery
/vordle — unit comparison page (up to 3 homes side by side)

## SEO / commercial landing pages (Phase 34.2 — buyer-intent entry pages)
/ridaelamud-harjumaa — A-energy townhouses (ridaelamu) in Harju County
/ridamajad-harjumaa — townhouses (ridamaja synonym) in Harju County
/uusarendus-kiili — new development in Kiili municipality (Vaela village)
/uusarendus-harjumaa — new development in Harju County near Tallinn
/uus-kodu-tallinna-lahedal — new home near Tallinn (apartment-to-townhouse move)
/maja-muuk-harjumaa — house-like comfort in a townhouse, Harju County
/a-energiaklassi-ridaelamud — A-energy-class townhouses (energy efficiency)
/perekodu-tallinna-lahedal — family home near Tallinn
/ridaelamu-oma-hooviga — townhouse with a private yard
/ridaelamu-vaela-kula — townhouses in Vaela village, Kiili municipality
/en/new-townhouses-near-tallinn — EN: new townhouses near Tallinn
/en/terraced-houses-harju-county — EN: terraced houses in Harju County
/ru/taunhaus-rjadom-s-tallinnom — RU: townhouses near Tallinn
/ru/novyj-dom-v-harjumaa — RU: new home in Harju County
Note: these are buyer-intent landing pages; the canonical price/availability source is /kodud-ja-hinnad.

## Unit pages (Phase 25 — individual home detail pages)
/kodud/magnoolia-tee-1-1 — Magnoolia tee 1/1, 5 rooms, 129.6 m², private yard 959.7 m², stage I
/kodud/magnoolia-tee-1-2 — Magnoolia tee 1/2, 4 rooms, 129.2 m², private yard 513.2 m², stage I
/kodud/magnoolia-tee-1-3 — Magnoolia tee 1/3, 5 rooms, 129.6 m², private yard 636.7 m², stage I
/kodud/magnoolia-tee-3-1 — Magnoolia tee 3/1, 5 rooms, 129.6 m², private yard 509.5 m², stage I
/kodud/magnoolia-tee-3-2 — Magnoolia tee 3/2, 4 rooms, 129.2 m², private yard ~500 m², stage I
/kodud/magnoolia-tee-3-3 — Magnoolia tee 3/3, 5 rooms, 129.6 m², private yard ~600 m², stage I
/kodud/magnoolia-tee-3-4 — Magnoolia tee 3/4, 4 rooms, 129.2 m², stage I
/kodud/magnoolia-tee-5-1 — Magnoolia tee 5/1, stage II, price on request
/kodud/magnoolia-tee-5-2 — Magnoolia tee 5/2, stage II, price on request
/kodud/magnoolia-tee-5-3 — Magnoolia tee 5/3, stage II, price on request

/kodud/magnoolia-tee-7-3 — Magnoolia tee 7/3, stage II, price on request
/kodud/magnoolia-tee-9-1 — Magnoolia tee 9/1, stage II, price on request
/kodud/magnoolia-tee-9-2 — Magnoolia tee 9/2, stage II, price on request
/kodud/magnoolia-tee-9-3 — Magnoolia tee 9/3, stage II, price on request
/kodud/magnoolia-tee-11-1 — Magnoolia tee 11/1, stage II, price on request
/kodud/magnoolia-tee-11-2 — Magnoolia tee 11/2, stage II, price on request
/kodud/magnoolia-tee-11-3 — Magnoolia tee 11/3, stage II, price on request
Purpose: individual Magnoolia townhouse pages with floor plans, area data, status and enquiry context.
Do not list admin or preview routes.
/asukoht — location, distances, neighbourhood
/ehitusinfo — technical specifications, construction phases
/sisedisain — interior design preview
/arhitektuur-ja-valisdisain — architecture and exterior design
/galerii — renders gallery
/ostuprotsess — purchase process steps
/finantseerimine — financing options
/kkk — frequently asked questions
/kontakt — contact form and direct contact
/aitah — thank-you page after form submission (noindex)

## Multilingual
Estonian: https://magnoolia.ee/
Russian: https://magnoolia.ee/ru/
English: https://magnoolia.ee/en/

## Important notes
- Prices are updated when confirmed by the developer. Do not cite specific prices from this file.
- Exact yard area (m²) per unit is to be confirmed in the sales contract.
- Floor plans are illustrative. Exact plans are confirmed per address.
- Site plan is illustrative. Interactive hotspot map is pending EXR/SVG mapping.
- Completion dates depend on building permits and construction schedule.
- No aggregateRating or review data is available from this source.
- No Offer schema with specific prices is published until the final price list is confirmed.
- Contact form submissions are logged and sent to diana@estlanda.ee. No info@magnoolia.ee address exists.
- The site is multilingual (ET/RU/EN). All three versions are indexable except /aitah (noindex).
